suites.name: Core vault management & permission engine
suites.claudePattern: tests/sigil.ts` (ts-mocha + LiteSVM, no validator needed, %d tests)

suites.name: Missing-coverage gap-fill (DC audit 2026-05-19)
suites.claudePattern: tests/missing-coverage.ts` (ts-mocha + LiteSVM, %d tests — happy-paths + TA-17 auto-revoke + PEN-8b cosign-gate + D-5 negative cases)

suites.name: Escrow integration (deposit/settle/refund)
suites.claudePattern: tests/escrow-integration.ts` (removed; escrow primitive deleted in v2 revamp Stage 1)

suites.name: Analytics counters (failed TX + per-agent TX count)
Post-execution assertions E2E (DELETED in Phase 1 Option A demolition — CrossFieldLte primitive removed)
suites.claudePattern: DELETED post-Phase-1: tests/post-assertion-integration.ts removed wholesale (was 9 tests for CrossFieldLte leverage cap)

suites.name: Custody adapters (`@usesigil/custody`)
suites.claudePattern: sdk/custody/tests/` (mocha + tsx, %d tests — crossmint, privy, turnkey)

suites.name: Kit-native SDK (`@usesigil/kit` — includes merged core + dashboard)
suites.claudePattern: sdk/kit/tests/` (mocha + tsx, %d tests — core + dashboard + errors + agent-bootstrap + preview-create-vault + audit-2026-05-23 remediation suites)

suites.name: Kit SDK devnet tests (`@usesigil/kit` devnet)
suites.claudePattern: sdk/kit/tests/devnet/` (mocha + tsx, %d tests — lifecycle, composed-tx, dashboard-integration)

suites.name: Rust unit tests (cargo test)
suites.claudePattern: cargo test --manifest-path programs/sigil/Cargo.toml` (%d tests — Phase 8 + audit-2026-05-23 grew this from 110 to 244 via state-pin + canonical-encoder + intent-digest unit tests)
